name: Ganesh Ban
title: Full-Stack Engineer & Creative Technologist
bio: I build elegant, performant web experiences at the intersection of design and engineering. Passionate about open-source, developer tooling, and making the web more accessible for everyone.

experience.description: Leading frontend infrastructure for the dashboard, reducing build times by 40% and improving Core Web Vitals across the platform.
Built and maintained the Stripe.js SDK and developer docs platform, used by millions of developers worldwide.
Designed and developed custom web applications for startups and small businesses across fintech and e-commerce.

projects.name: Codebeam
projects.description: A real-time collaborative code editor with AI-assisted completions and live preview. Used by 10k+ developers.

projects.name: Pagefold
projects.description: An open-source static site generator focused on typography and editorial design. 2k GitHub stars.

projects.name: Terracycle
projects.description: A sustainability tracker that gamifies eco-friendly habits. Winner of GreenHack 2023.
